candidates.why: This captures current maturities of long-term debt, but it may not include all short-term borrowings/current interest-bearing liabilities.
Cash-flow line, not a balance-sheet debt balance.

variables.notes: R:c. Current debt appears split/ambiguous. 'Interest-bearing liabilities' in current liabilities would likely be the best economic match, but the label is duplicated elsewhere on the sheet, so it cannot be uniquely identified in this schema. Using the unique current-maturity line as a conservative choice, but review is recommended because this may understate total STD.
